final:
module RefModule(
    input [15:0] A,
    input [15:0] B,
    input [1:0] control,
    output reg [15:0] result
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (control)
            2'b00: result = A + B;      // Addition
            2'b01: result = A - B;      // Subtraction
            2'b10: result = A & B;      // AND
            2'b11: result = A | B;      // OR
            default: result = 16'b0;     // Default case
        endcase
    end
endmodule
